channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ring bling: Dodgers show off glittering World Series rings in pregame ceremony
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani and Clayton Kershaw joined their Los Angeles Dodgers teammates in sticking their fists out to show off their glittering World Series rings in a ceremony Friday night.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top-seeded Auburn rallies in 2nd half, beats Michigan 78-65 in Sweet 16 of March Madness
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — With Auburn's season on the brink, Tahaad Pettiford and Denver Jones suddenly became unstoppable. On to the Elite Eight for the top overall seed in the NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan State's 2nd-half rally sends Spartans past Ole Miss 73-70 as Izzo wins again in Sweet 16
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jase Richardson's hot shooting helped Michigan State overcome a poor start and move into another Elite Eight, though the Spartans need at least one more win for a real celebration. “We don’t put up any banners for Elite Eights,” coach Tom Izzo said.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fans chant 'sell the team' at Rays home opener; team owner says talks are nothing new
item.description: The Rays pulled out a win in their new home for the season at Steinbrenner Field, but the ball club's future in Tampa Bay remains uncertain.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Falcons' Kirk Cousins sparks trade rumors with trip to Cleveland
item.description: Quarterback Kirk Cousins didn't attempt to hide his offseason travels after he was pictured at several restaurants in Cleveland this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lilia Vu has another bogey-free day and leads a pack of LPGA stars in Arizona
item.description: CHANDLER, Ariz. (AP) — Lilia Vu didn't feel her best on the range. She made up for that on the golf course Friday with an 8-under 64, giving her a two-shot lead over a group that includes Nelly Korda and Jeeno Thitikul in a Ford Championship packed with LPGA stars. Korda and Thitikul, the Nos.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Morrow, Williams and LSU return to Elite Eight with 80-73 March Madness win over N.C. State
item.description: SPOKANE, Wash. (AP) — Aneesah Morrow had 30 points and 19 rebounds, Kailyn Gilbert had a critical block that set up Mikaylah Williams' go-ahead layup with 1:07 remaining, and No. 3 seed LSU rallied past second-seeded N.C. State 80-73 in a tense women’s NCAA Tournament regional semifinal on Friday.
item.dc:creator: HENRY KRUEGER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Deion Sanders walks back comments on son Shedeur Sanders' landing spot in NFL Draft
item.description: Deion Sanders said he won't wield his influence over Shedeur Sanders as the NFL Draft draws near. Coach Prime previously indicated he preferred his son land with certain franchises.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ties record with 62 for the lead in the Houston Open
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Scottie Scheffler opened with two straight birdies and was on his way Friday in the Houston Open, tying the Memorial Park record with an 8-under 62 for a one-shot lead when the second round was halted by darkness after a two-hour storm delay Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Juan Soto slugs first homer for Mets in win against Astros
item.description: Juan Soto hit his first home run with the New York Mets when he connected in the third inning against the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NCAA Tournament: Top storylines going into Saturday’s Texas Tech vs. Florida Elite 8 game
item.description: Texas Tech faces top-seeded Florida at Chase Center in San Francisco after dramatic comeback victory over Arkansas in regional semifinal.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: MiLaysia Fulwiley helps defending champion South Carolina outlast Maryland 71-67 in March Madness
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — MiLaysia Fulwiley scored 23 points, including a go-ahead layup with 2:22 left, and Chloe Kitts added 15 points and 11 rebounds to help No. 1 seed South Carolina beat fourth-seeded Maryland 71-67 on Friday in the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brazil fires coach Dorival Júnior after worst defeat in World Cup qualifying
item.description: Brazil coach Dorival Júnior was fired on Friday after 14 months amid poor results and disappointing performances from the national team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: CF Montreal seeks first win of the season, visits the Chicago Fire
item.description: CF Montreal (0-4-1) vs. Chicago Fire (3-1-1) Chicago; Saturday, 8:30 p.m. EDT BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Chicago -175, Montreal +429, Draw +308; over/under is 2.5 goals BOTTOM LINE: CF Montreal seeks its first victory of the season when it visits the Chicago Fire.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: With Lionel Messi watching, Novak Djokovic advances to Miami Open final
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Novak Djokovic had some company for another Miami Open victory. With Lionel Messi watching from a suite, Djokovic cruised into the Miami Open final by routing 14th-seeded Grigor Dimitrov 6-2, 6-3 on Friday at Hard Rock Stadium.
item.dc:creator: MARC BERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colorado rewards Deion Sanders with contract extension, becomes one of college football's highest-paid coaches
item.description: Deion Sanders coached Colorado to a 9-3 regular season record in his second year in Boulder. On Friday, he said he was grateful for the university's continued belief in him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Charles Barkley calls Stephen A Smith 'lame and weak' after ESPN star fires back at LeBron James
item.description: Basketball Hall of Famer Charles Barkley gave his take on the feud between ESPN's Stephen A. Smith and Los Angeles Lakers star LeBron James.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Democratic lawmaker in Washington likens trans sports bans to racial segregation
item.description: A Democratic lawmaker in Washington likened legislation barring trans athletes from girls' and women's sports to racial segregation during a House Education Committee session on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Orioles' Tyler O'Neill crushes home run on MLB's Opening Day to extend record
item.description: Tyler O’Neill's Baltimore Orioles debut was similar to his past five Opening Days, as the Canadian swatted a three-run homer in Toronto to extend his MLB record.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Miguel Amaya has 2 doubles and 5 RBIs to lead the Cubs past the Diamondbacks 10-6
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Miguel Amaya hit two doubles and had five RBIs, Ian Happ added a homer, double and three RBIs and the Chicago Cubs beat the Arizona Diamondbacks 10-6 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giddey's half-court buzzer beater completes miraculous comeback against Lakers, 119-117
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Josh Giddey could feel it as soon as the ball left his fingertips. In a flash, teammates were mobbing him.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SF's Chase Center hosting NCAA Men's Basketball games Thursday, Saturday
item.description: (BCN) -- San Francisco is hosting two games at Chase Center on Thursday in the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship tournament. At 4:39 p.m., University of Florida, which is the No. 1 seed in the West region of the tournament's bracket, plays No. 4 University of Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: White Sox Opening Day: A lot of 'new' on the South Side in 2025. What to know if you're headed to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — After a 2024 season that everyone would rather forget, there's a lot of "new" on the South Side as the White Sox get set to embark on their 2025 campaign Thursday. There's a new manager, Will Venable. There's a new stadium name, Rate Field. There's a new food and beverage menu.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: USF Football spring game features street fest & halftime alumni game
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - The USF Spring Game returns to Corbett Stadium on the USF Campus on Sat., April 26 and will feature a street fest outside the stadium and the always popular alumni flag football game at halftime.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers to make Trump White House visit next month
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers plan to visit President Donald Trump at the White House to celebrate their World Series victory, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Tennessee pitcher Karlyn Pickens throws fastest pitch in college softball history
item.description: Tennessee softball standout Karlyn Pickens wrote her name into the history books on Monday with a record-breaking pitch.
item.dc:creator: Gregory Raucoules, WGN 9

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mitchell returns to Utah, leads Cavs past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Jarrett Allen scored 18 points and Donovan Mitchell added 16, helping Cleveland snap a four-game losing streak with a 120-91 victory over the Utah Jazz on Sunday. Evan Mobley had 11 points, 11 rebounds and three blocks to help the Cavaliers get back in the win column.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 1 seed Houston holds off Gonzaga comeback, beats No. 8 seed Bulldogs 81-76 to reach Sweet 16
item.description: LJ Cryer matched a career high with 30 points, including two free throws with 14.2 seconds left, and No. 1 seed Houston held on to beat eighth-seeded Gonzaga 81-76 on Saturday night to reach the Sweet 16 for the sixth straight NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sweet 16: Calipari guides Arkansas past Pitino, St. John's 75-66 for 16th trip to regional semifinal
item.description: John Calipari is heading to the Sweet 16 for the 16th time, and this one could be the sweetest of all.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC are headed to the Lone Star State to take on Austin FC
item.description: San Diego FC are gearing up for Matchday 5 of the MLS season, which will see them head to the Texas capital to take on Austin FC at 1:00 p.m. on Sunday March 23rd.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5
